abilities.description: Slams the ground, dealing damage and slowing the movement speed and attack rate of nearby enemy units.
abilities.name: Thunder Clap
abilities.story: A slam of Mangix' mighty keg starts the festivities.

abilities.description: Drenches himself and an area in alcohol, causing enemy units to move slower and ignited once they take any spell damage. Duration is increased by 3 seconds when enemies are ignited. While Brewmaster is Brewed Up, His Drunken Brawler Stances are stronger.
abilities.name: Cinder Brew
abilities.story: The Order of the Oyo's solution to all problems - another round!

abilities.description: Brewmaster can switch stances based on the elements he controls gaining passive bonuses that improve against enemies when Brewed Up. Earth Stance - Grants 2/4/6/8 armor and 8%/12%/16%/20% Magic Resistance. Bonuses are 1.5x when Brewed Up. Storm Stance - Grants 15%/20%/25%/30% evasion and 4%/6%/8%/10% Bonus Move Speed. Bonuses are 1.5x when Brewed Up Fire Stance Grants 20% chance to crit for 120%/140%/160%/180% of your attack damage and 10/20/30/40 attack speed. Chance is 1.5x when Brewed Up. Void Stance - Grants bonus Status Resistance to Brewmaster and applies a 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% Slow for 2s on attack. Slow and Status Resistance are 1.5x when affected by Cinder Brew.
abilities.name: Drunken Brawler
abilities.story: When Mangix won his title as the Brewmaster of the Order of Oyo, he also claimed his place in the mastery of inebriation.

abilities.description: Splits Brewmaster into elements, forming 4 specialized warriors, adept at survival, each with their own abilities. If any of them survive until the end of their summoned timer, the Brewmaster is reborn.
abilities.name: Primal Split
abilities.story: It isn't clear whether Mangix is consciously aware of his potent bond with nature, as it often occurs in the midst of a drunken stupor.

abilities.description: Throws a boulder at a unit, doing damage and stunning it.
abilities.name: Hurl Boulder

abilities.description: Damages summoned units in an area and purges most buffs or debuffs.
abilities.name: Dispel Magic

abilities.description: Encloses a unit in a tornado, removing it from the battlefield.
abilities.name: Cyclone

abilities.description: Provides temporary invisibility, bonus movement speed and attack damage when invisible.
abilities.name: Wind Walk

abilities.description: Provides the Brewling phased movement and bonus status resistance.
abilities.name: Permanent Phase

description: Splits into elemental spirits with unique abilities. For nine days Mangix fought the master of his order, both warriors swilling and striking in equal measure, until at last the elder collapsed into a drunken stupor. Having claimed the title of Brewmaster, Mangix now wanders the land as a Drunken Brawler, swinging and evading with unpredictable finesse. Under one arm he holds a great keg, and not merely for storing his Cinder Brew. Mangix drenches himself and enemies in alcohol, strengthening himself in an advanced state of inebriation based on his stance, while disorienting enemies before slamming the barrel down with a Thunder Clap. Rumor around taverns is that the Brewmaster is actually composed of Elemental Spirits, each with their own unique abilities, and should one catch him sufficiently intoxicated, one may just witness this Primal Split in action. trivia: Brewmaster, like Storm Spirit, Ember Spirit and Earth Spirit, was a Pandaren in DotA. However, he was re-skinned due to copyright issues with "Blizzard Entertainment". His design is similar to that of a red panda, rather than the giant panda that the Pandaren in DotA were based on.
His design is similar to that of a red panda, rather than the giant panda that the Pandaren in DotA were based on.

hero_talents.talent_left: Cinder Brew applies Fear when ignited
